conditions.description: Participation is limited to legal entities established in EU Member States, Iceland, Norway, and the following associated countries: Canada, Israel, Republic of Korea, New Zealand, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom.
Entities controlled by non-eligible countries may be excluded from participation unless appropriate guarantees are provided.
Activities are expected to start at TRL 2 and achieve TRL 5 by the end of the project.
The maximum EU contribution per project is 19,000,000 EUR.

Standard Horizon Europe minimum consortium composition requirements for RIA apply (typically minimum 3 independent legal entities from 3 different eligible countries). Not explicitly restated in the topic-specific text.
conditions.assumption_note: The call_entry.eligibility_conditions field is empty in the source slice document. Standard Horizon Europe RIA consortium composition rules (minimum 3 independent legal entities established in 3 different EU Member States or associated countries) apply per the General Annexes and are not topic-specific derogations. This assumption must be verified against the applicable Tier 1 normative framework documents (General Annexes) before use in compliance checking.

conditions.description: Open access obligations for research outputs and publications apply under the standard Horizon Europe open access policy.
conditions.assumption_note: The call_entry.eligibility_conditions field is empty in the source slice. Open access conditions for RIA are standard Horizon Europe requirements per the Grant Agreement and General Annexes and are not topic-specific. This assumption must be verified against Tier 1 normative framework documents. The additional requirement to share results via the AI-on-demand platform (SR-06, CC-04) supplements but does not substitute for the general open access obligation.
